articles.title: Airlines find the grass isn't always greener with new engines

articles.title: Paramount-WBD merger wins approval from DOJ
articles.summary: The DOJ approval is an important milestone for the roughly $110 billion deal, though it could still face legal challenges from state attorneys general.

articles.title: Elon Musk becomes world's first trillionaire as SpaceX begins trading on the Nasdaq
articles.summary: Elon Musk's stake in SpaceX is worth more than $766 billion. Combined with his Tesla holdings, Musk's net worth as of Friday is roughly $1.05 trillion.

articles.title: SpaceX millionaires are set to spend big on luxury homes, watches and private jet travel
articles.summary: SpaceX employees have to wait to sell their shares, but many are already planning how to spend their windfalls.
